palmier-savory-puff-pastry-glasses-argir.name: Palmier Savory (puff Pastry Glasses)

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons of pecorino or parmesan cheese
3 tablespoons of pecorino or parmesan cheese

instructions: Dry the smooth tomatoes first on kitchen paper.
Spread the puff pastry on the kitchen counter and cover it evenly with the pesto sauce.
Add the smooth tomatoes, sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of grated cheese and pepper.
Roll one side along the puff pastry to the center of the leaf. Repeat the same on the other hand to create two rolls that are tightly joined in the center.
Place the roll in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to tighten. Then, brush around with a beaten egg using a brush and cut it with a sharp knife in about 20 slices.
In a bowl, mix the mustard with honey.
Spread the second leaf of puff pastry on a floured surface. Cover the whole surface with the prosciutto slices and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of grated cheese.
Roll back the puff pastry from both sides to the center. Place the roll in the refrigerator for 30 minutes. Then brush with egg and cut into about 20 slices.

Place the slices on a buttered sheet and make the palmiers in a preheated evening at 190°C, in the air, for about 10 minutes, until golden. Once they are removed from the oven, sprinkle them with the rest of the cheese.

pan-pizza-recipe-or-pizza-without-oven-c.name: Pan Pizza Recipe Or Pizza Without Oven
pan-pizza-recipe-or-pizza-without-oven-c.original_name: Receta de pizza en sartén o pizza sin horno

ingredients.item: 1/2  kilo de harina de trigo sin levadura
Some branches of fresh rosemary (or a handful of oregan powder).)
A handful of olive cut into slices (optional)

instructions: To start with, you'll need the water to be warm. To do this step you can simply put it into the microwave for about 20 or 30 seconds.
Then, in a bowl, mix warm water with Royal powder. Also add half a teaspoon (small) salt coffee machine and 1 / 4 of a teaspoon powder.
When you have the first dissolved ingredients, add the flour little by little and get mixed at the same time to make sure they don't get clumsy.
When you have finished mixing the flour and have achieved a consistent consistency, we have to cover the bowl with a cover or with a plastic film.
Luego hay que guardar la masa cubierta en el refrigerador durante dos horas.
Before re-production of the pizza in frying pan, it's a good time to get the ingredients of the decoration ready. In this case, pits the chorizo into thin cuts and ham into frames or ribbons.
Pica el queso en ruedas delgadas
Now we have to talk about frying pan. It should have a big diameter and be non-stick. Put an oil jet and distribute it well onto the surface.
Then we have to place the mass at the centre and put it with a scatula to adapt to the bottom of the frying pan. Ideally, it's fine enough but without breaking.
Depending on the size of the frying pan, it's possible that about one part of the dough, to make another pizza. To smash the dough, you can help with your fingers.
El borde de la pizza debe quedar un poco levantado en los bordes, recubriendo ligeramente las paredes de la olla.

Once satisfied with the place of the mass, it begins to cover with the ingredients of the decoration. To start with, place some tomato sauce at the centre and distribute evenly. Don't be conservative with how much salsa. The best thing's a generous quantity:)
Then distribute mozzarella wheels onto pizza, evenly. At once, it also distribute chorizo and ham cuts.
At this point you can put the frying pan with soft fire to start cooking.
The following will be sprinkle with the oregan powder and with the branches of fresh rosemary. If you have decided to use pimenton and olive on wheels, distribute these ingredients evenly onto pizza.
Si te ha sobrado masa, guarda una parte proporcional de los otros ingredientes para que puedas decorar una siguiente pizza.
To continue, cover the frying pan so that the heat will be focused. Be sure to have the fire to a minimum.
Let the pizza cook about 10 to 15 minutes, but make sure you keep an eye on it, because depending on your frying pan's size and its bottom thickness, pizza may be ready faster.
When ready leave carefully with the help of a wooden scatula with care to avoid breaking. You can tipple the frying pan through the mango to slip the pizza and put it onto a plate.
That's all. Let's eat!

pan-roasted-rib-eyes.name: Pan-roasted Rib Eyes

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and coarsely ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Season steaks generously with salt and pepper; let rest at room temperature for 30 minutes. Scatter thyme and rosemary sprigs evenly in bottom of a roasting pan; dot with 4 Tbsp. butter.

Melt 1 Tbsp. butter with 1 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium and add 1 steak to skillet. Cook until seared and golden brown on all sides (including edges), 2–3 minutes per side. Transfer steak to prepared roasting pan. Pour out oil and wipe skillet with paper towels. Repeat with remaining 1 Tbsp. butter, 1 Tbsp. oil, and steak.

Roast steaks in oven, turning halfway through cooking and basting frequently with herb butter in pan, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into steak registers 125° for medium-rare, about 20 minutes, or to desired doneness.

Transfer steaks to a cutting board. Drizzle 1 Tbsp. herb butter from roasting pan over each steak and let rest for 10 minutes. Slice against the grain and divide among plates. Don’t forget to set out the bones for those who like to gnaw on them. Serve with Béarnaise Sauce.

pancetta-wrapped-dates-stuffed-with-manc.name: Pancetta-wrapped Dates Stuffed With Manchego Cheese And Mint
instructions: Cut a small slice off one short end of each date and discard.
Using tweezers or needlenose pliers, carefully remove pits from dates through the small opening; discard pits.
Place 1 mint leaf across the opening of one date, covering the cavity.
Using 1 cheese strip, push the mint leaf and cheese into the date cavity.
Using fingers, pinch the date opening closed.
Repeat with the remaining dates, mint leaves, and cheese strips.
Wrap 3 pancetta slices securely around each date, enclosing the date completely.
Place the pancetta-wrapped dates on a baking sheet, spacing slightly apart.
DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.
Preheat oven to 191°C (190°C).
Bake dates uncovered until the pancetta is crisp and the bottoms of the dates caramelize, about 30 minutes.
Using tongs, transfer dates to a platter and serve warm.

paper-kebab-with-lamb-meat-lezzet.name: Paper Kebab With Lamb Meat
instructions: 1. Is it a paper-free damp? From the classic tastes of Turkish cuisine, paper kebabs will notice your table to serve with plenty of garlic, peppers with another class.
2. Arpacık onions in boiling water for 5 minutes.
3. Peel the water and peel the peels.
4. Peel the bark of Carrots and potatoes and chop it in the form of dice.
5. Blend lamb bird, carrot, potatoes, boiled peas, barley onion, salt, pepper and olive oil in a large container.
6. Cut 4 oil paper in sizes 30 x 20 cm.
7. Share the mixture of vegetables that you prepare for each medium.
8. Fold the middle from the four sides and fold again accurately from the long edges.
9. Place the prepared paper kebabs into the oven tray.
10. Bake for 35 minutes in the oven with a pre-heated 180 degree.
11. 11. Serve hot.
12. If you do not want to use lamb meat, you can browse the recipe of paper & paper prepared with beef.

pasta-al-pomodoro.name: Pasta Al Pomodoro
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-low. Cook onion, stirring occasionally, until soft, 10–12 minutes. Add garlic and cook, stirring, about 3 minutes. Add red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, 1 minute. Increase heat to medium, add puréed tomatoes, and season lightly with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens slightly and flavors have come together, 20–25 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in basil.

Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente (about
2 minutes before it would be done). Drain, reserving ½ cup pasta cooking liquid.

As soon as pasta is ready, pluck out and discard basil. Set skillet over high heat and stir in reserved pasta cooking liquid to loosen sauce; bring to a boil. Add pasta and cook, stirring, until sauce coats pasta and pasta is al dente, about 2 minutes. Remove pan from heat. Add butter and Parmesan and toss until butter and cheese are melted. Divide pasta among bowls.

pasta-salad-with-broccoli-walnuts-and-ap.name: Pasta Salad With Broccoli, Walnuts And Apple
pasta-salad-with-broccoli-walnuts-and-ap.original_name: Salada de Massa com Brócolos, Nozes e Maçã

ingredients.item: 100  g massa espirais ou cotovelos cozida

instructions: Cook the dough in water with salt and a thread of olive oil, drain and reserve.
Add basil, garlic, nuts, lemon juice and salt to a food processor. Crush everything until you get a folder and book.
In a frying pan with a little olive oil, put the broccoli and let it saute in a light about 5 minutes. Remove from the skillet and reserve.
In a bowl put the broccoli, season with salt and pepper, add the basil sauce, the apple and the pasta and wrap it all. Serve sprinkled with more nuts.

pasta-salad-with-peas-and-corn.name: Pasta Salad With Peas And Corn

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil; cook pasta at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, 9 to 12 minutes. Drain and let cool in the refrigerator, at least 15 minutes.
Mix cooled pasta with ranch dressing, peas, corn, salt, and pepper.

pasta-with-tomatoes-and-mozzarella.name: Pasta With Tomatoes And Mozzarella

ingredients.item: Medium shell-shaped or other short pasta

instructions: Rub the inside of a medium bowl with garlic; discard garlic. Combine tomatoes, mozzarella, basil, and oil in bowl; season with salt and pepper and toss to combine. Let tomato mixture sit 15 minutes to let flavors meld.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente; drain. Add pasta to tomato mixture and toss to combine.
DO AHEAD: Tomato mixture can be made 8 hours ahead. Cover and chill. Bring mixture to room temperature before tossing with hot pasta.

pastry-with-yogurt-and-meat-juice-lezzet.name: Pastry With Yogurt And Meat Juice
instructions: 1. 1 tablespoon of butter melt in the pan.
2. Add fine chopped onions and roast until pink.
3. Add and roast for 15 minutes.
4. Taste salt and pepper and get from the stove.
5. For raw, eggs together with water lick.
6. Add salt and flour and knead.
7. Soft and purulent preparation a dough.
8. Separate and round the dough with 3 cloths.
9. A&ccedil is ready for the first bezeyi oxlava.
10. Home
11. 11. 11. 11. Yufkanin broadcasts 1/3.

15. Oil girl bö fry meats.
16. Glow bö indexes to a wide-edge tray.

20. Böreduce unfiltered transfer to service plate.
21. Ü tour the yogurt and wealth.

patsavouropita-of-argyros-argiro.name: Patsavouropita Of Argyros
instructions: We start by opening the crust cards from the package.
Cut them with a sharp knife into thin slices.
If we have time, leave them on the bench for 15 minutes, gently dry and dry lightly.
Open them with your fingers and place them in bowls.
Add the grated cheeses and finely chopped ham.
In another bowl, beat the eggs.
Continue by adding to the mixture for the patsabourita with yogurt, milk, pepper, nutmeg and olive oil.
Salt if you put in too carefully, because the other ingredients are very delicious.
After the liquid materials are homogenized, we combine them with the solid materials by mixing very well so that the last piece of leaf for the patsabourita is wet.

pea-fava-with-dill-lezzet.name: Pea Fava With Dill
instructions: 1. Clean the onions and chop it.
2. Take the olive oil into the pot and heat it.
3. Roast onions in jealous fire.
4. Taste Tuzla.
5. Add and boil water.
6. Cook the saucepan until the cover of the pot is clearly softened.
7. Take the pot from the stove to pull the water.
8. Place it into a container with ice water inside.
9. Add chopped stream and mint.
10. Crush with Blender, make it pure.
11. 11. slice the bread of the baget and fry in the oven.
12. On the fava swollen and fryed bag cheese.
12. August Serve.

pea-soup-with-foie-gras.name: Pea Soup With Foie Gras

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Raw duck or goose foie gras

instructions: Place peas in a large pot; add cold water to cover by 2". Let soak overnight.

Drain peas; return to pot. Add onion, carrot, celery, and bacon. Add water to cover ingredients by 2". Bring to a boil over medium-low heat, stirring often. Continue cooking at a very low simmer, stirring every 15 minutes and occasionally skimming foam from the surface, until peas are almost tender, 2–3 hours (time will vary depending on age of peas). Season with salt. Simmer until peas are very tender, 15–45 minutes longer. Season to taste with salt and pepper. do ahead: Can be made 2 days ahead. Let cool slightly. Chill uncovered until cold, then cover and chill. Return to a simmer before continuing.

Season foie gras cubes, if using, with salt; divide among warmed bowls. Ladle hot soup over cubes and let stand until foie gras is warmed through, about 2 minutes. Drizzle with oil; sprinkle with pepper.

peach-a-berry-pie.name: Peach-a-berry Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place peaches and berries in a colander for about 15 minutes to drain any excess liquid, then transfer to a large bowl. Gently toss with sugar, flour, and cinnamon.
Place one pastry into the bottom of a 9-inch pie pan. Pour fruit filling into pastry, dot with butter, and top with remaining pastry. Cut vents in top pastry and sprinkle with coarse sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is golden brown, about 45 minutes.

pepernoten-the-dutch-spiced-christmas-co.name: Pepernoten, The Dutch Spiced Christmas Cookies
pepernoten-the-dutch-spiced-christmas-co.original_name: Pepernoten, las galletas especiadas holandesas de Navidad

ingredients.item: 180 g de mantequilla salada (a temperatura ambiente)
1 cucharada de polvo de hornear o levadura en polvo
¼ of teaspoon of ground anise

instructions: Gather your oven at 160-3-pg (160-3-pg) and make a baking plate with scroll paper
In a big bowl, it combines the steamed flour and the mixture of spices (cinnamon, nutmeg, cardamom, clove and anises). Mix well to make sure that the spices are evenly distributed into the flour.
In another bowl, mix melted butter, brown sugar, cane sugar syrup or maple syrup, honey and milk. Revolves till all liquid ingredients are well combined.
Add the liquid mixture to the flour and spices mixture. Mix up and get a smooth and uniform mass.

Once the dough is uniform and soft, it forms small balls the size of a nut with their hands and put them on the baking plate, leaving space between them as the cookies will expand while they are baked.
Bake the cookies in the preheated oven for about 15- 20 minutes, or until they are golden and crispy.
Take out the cookies from the oven and let them cool onto the plate for a few minutes before transferring them to a grid to get them completely cold.

pepino.name: Pepino

ingredients.item: Basil leaves plus 1 sprig basil for garnish

instructions: Using a muddler or the handle of a wooden spoon, mash 1 cucumber slice in a cocktail shaker. Add tequila, basil leaves, lime juice, Cointreau, pineapple juice, agave, and 1 cup ice. Shake several times to blend. Pour cocktail into a tall glass; garnish with remaining cucumber slice and basil sprig.

peppermint-pink-valentine-mold.name: Peppermint Pink Valentine Mold
instructions: In a medium saucepan over no heat, combine gelatin, 1/4 cup sugar and salt, mix well and reserve. In a medium bowl, beat together egg yolks and milk, add to gelatin mixture.

Cook gelatin and egg mixture in saucepan over low heat; stir constantly until the gelatin dissolves and mixture thickens slightly or about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and add peppermint extract or candy.
Add food coloring and mix. Chill in refrigerator until mixture is slightly thicker than the consistency of unbeaten egg whites.
In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff, but not dry. Gradually add remaining sugar and beat until very stiff and fold into gelatin mixture; fold in whipped cream.
Turn into a 5-cup heart-shaped mold; chill until firm. Unmold and garnish with additional whipped cream, if desired; serve.

pepperoni-argiro.name: Pepperoni
instructions: Cut and clean the peppers from the seeds.
Cut them into thin strips and do the same with onions.
Cut the tomatoes in half, remove the seeds and chop them.
Heat the olive oil in a large pan and sauté the onion and garlic until the onion becomes transparent, about 5 minutes. Add the peppers and mix well to oil. Add the vintage.
Add the chopped tomatoes. Cover and simmer for 15'-20', soften the peppers gently. Salt and pepper and sprinkle with parsley. If you want to add some capers and some olives for garnishing.
Allow the pepper to cool and keep it in the refrigerator for three days.

pepperoni-pizza-recipe-lezzet.name: Pepperoni Pizza Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of white flour, you can use full wheat flour, buckwheat flour or gluten-free flour mixture.
fine More and &il; a dough of to eatless dough can also be preferred, but the tongue and soften are reduced.
Add rawura flavor for olive oil can add slightly garlic or spicy oil instead.
Tomato püYou can use ready pizza sauce or reindeed fresh tomatoes.
You can get a different aroma by adding roka, thyme mixture, garlic or bitter red pepper instead of classic fesle and thyme.
For those who want a sweeter sauce, i&ccedil can add some honey or a small amount of sugar.
Mozzarella can be used in cheese, cheddar, gouda or vegan cheese instead.
You can increase both flavor and melt by using cheese mixture.
Instead of classic pepperoni, you can use sucuk, bacon, chicken salam, turkey slices or vegan/bitkisel pepperoni.
A lighter version can reduce the amount of to pepperoni and add plenty of vegetables (biber, strawberries, corn, olive oil).
You can enrich the pizza by adding fresh fesle, roka, red pepper slices, corn or mushroom.

instructions: 1. Mix water, yeast and sugar in a bowl.
2. Active of meals for 5 minutes.
3. Add flour, salt and olive oil and knead a dough that is soft, not addressed.
4. Cover 1 hour.
5. Wrap yellowms in olive oil short time roast.
6. Tomato porridge, add and sugar and cook in jealous fire for 5 minutes.
7. Leave to cool.
8. Place the yeast dough into thin a&ccedil on the uncoated countertop;in and oily paper mass tray.
9. Spray pulp, rozzarella cheese, pepperoni slices.
10. 12–15 minutes, bake the edges up to gold color.
11. 11. Serve hot, s&uuml with fresh bouncer if you want.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

phenomenal-pork-tacos.name: Phenomenal Pork Tacos

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mince a few slices of onion to get 1 tablespoon. Add minced onion, tomato, kiwi, juice from 2 lime wedges, 3/4 of the cilantro, salt, and pepper to a small bowl. Mix into a salsa.
Juice 1/4 of the lime into another small bowl; mix in sour cream to make the crema.

Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add sliced onion and poblano pepper. Cook, tossing occasionally, until softened and lightly charred, 3 to 4 minutes. Add pork and Mexican seasoning. Cook until pork is browned throughout, 4 to 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium-low. Add chicken stock, tomato paste, salt, and pepper. Cook and stir until everything is coated, 1 to 2 minutes.
Wrap tortillas in a damp cloth and microwave for 30 seconds. Divide tortillas over plates; spread lime crema on top. Top tortillas with pork mixture and salsa. Garnish with remaining cilantro.

pickled-chiles.name: Pickled Chiles
instructions: Combine garlic and salt in a 1-qt. glass jar or nonreactive container. Add vinegar and 2 cups hot water. Cover and shake to dissolve. Add chiles to brine, cover jar, and let sit at room temperature 48 hours before using.
Do Ahead: Pickles can be made 2 weeks ahead. Cover and chill after sitting 48 hours at room temperature.

pickled-french-fries.name: Pickled French Fries
instructions: Combine 5 Tbsp. salt and 8 cups water in a large bowl or pot, stirring until salt dissolves. Add potatoes and cabbage (potatoes should sink, but some of the cabbage leaves may float). Cover bowl and store in a cool, dark place (a kitchen cabinet or pantry is ideal) 4–6 days; the longer the potatoes sit, the funkier their flavor will be. Drain and pat potatoes dry; discard cabbage leaves.

Fit a large pot with thermometer and pour in oil to measure 3" up sides of pot. Heat oil over medium-high until thermometer registers 325°. Working in batches (you want potatoes to have room to move around), fry potatoes until cooked through and tender but not browned, about 5 minutes. Using a spider or a slotted spoon, transfer fries to paper towels to drain as they are done.

Heat oil until thermometer registers 375°. Working in batches again, refry potatoes until crisp (the edges may brown, but fries will mostly stay pretty light), about 1 minute per batch. Transfer to fresh paper towels to drain; sprinkle with salt (because of the brine, you won’t need to add much).

pierogi-traditional-polish-dumplings.name: Pierogi (traditional Polish Dumplings)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Prepare filling: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir onions and mushrooms in hot oil until soft, about 15 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.

Pass potatoes and farmer's cheese separately through a food grinder or food processor; place both in a large bowl. Add onion-mushroom mixture, sour cream, salt, and pepper; mix until well combined and set filling aside.

Make dough: Place flour on a clean work surface and form a well in the center. Crack eggs into the well. Add butter and a few tablespoons warm water. Mix with your hands, gradually adding more warm water, 1 tablespoon at a time, as you go. Knead until dough is soft and smooth, adding more flour to the work surface as needed.

Roll out 1/4 of the dough to an 1/8-inch thickness. Use a glass or round cookie cutter to cut out circles, saving any excess dough for your next batch. Place 1 teaspoon filling in the center of each dough circle. Fold dough over into a half-moon shape and pinch edges together to seal. Cover pierogi with a clean dish towel and repeat with remaining dough and filling.

Bring a large pot of salted water to a gentle boil. Cook pierogi in batches, about 20 at a time, in boiling water until they float to the surface, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon to a strainer to drain.

pineapple-pie.name: Pineapple Pie
instructions: To make the filling: Combine crushed pineapple with juice, sugar, cornstarch, and lemon juice in a medium saucepan. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened, then boil for 1 minute. Allow filling to cool slightly.
Line a 9-inch pie dish with one of the crusts. Pour filling into the prepared pie dish.
Cover with remaining crust; press and flute the edges to seal. Cut a few steam vents on top, brush with milk, and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until pie is golden brown and pineapple filling is bubbling, about 35 minutes. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

pinto-bean-and-ham-torta.name: Pinto Bean And Ham Torta

ingredients.item: Fresh cilantro leaves and tender stems

instructions: Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium. Add scallions and garlic and cook, stirring often, until softened, about 2 minutes. Add beans and ¼ cup water and cook, stirring and smashing beans with the side of a wooden spoon until mostly mashed, adding more water 1 Tbsp. at a time if needed, until beans are the consistency of loose mashed potatoes. Stir in 1 Tbsp. lime juice and season with salt and pepper.

Toss romaine and cilantro with 2 Tbsp. lime juice in a medium bowl and season with salt and pepper. Scoop flesh from avocado into another medium bowl and smash with remaining 1 Tbsp. lime juice with a fork until mostly smooth. Season with salt.
Divide bean mixture among bottom halves of rolls and top with cotija, ham, romaine mixture, and chips, if using. Spread avocado mixture on top halves of rolls and close sandwiches.
Do Ahead: Mashed beans can be made up to 2 days ahead. Add a little water to loosen if necessary before spreading on rolls.

pork-cutlets-with-cantaloupe-salad.name: Pork Cutlets With Cantaloupe Salad
instructions: Prick pork cutlets all over with a fork; season with salt. Transfer to a large resealable plastic bag; add coarsely grated cantaloupe, lime juice, and oil. Seal bag and toss cantaloupe to coat; chill 1 hour.
Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Remove pork from marinade and grill, turning, until browned and cooked through, about 4 minutes; transfer to a platter.
Toss together scallions, chile, thinly sliced cantaloupe, cilantro, fish sauce, and lime juice. Arrange salad over pork; top with peanuts.

pork-loin-with-cherry-vinaigrette.name: Pork Loin With Cherry Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Quartered pitted sweet or sour cherries

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Heat oil in a medium skillet over high. Season pork with salt and pepper; cook, turning occasionally, until golden brown, 10–12 minutes.
Transfer pork to a rimmed baking sheet; roast in oven for 8 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss cherries, vinegar, oil, and mustard in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Slice pork and serve with watercress and vinaigrette.

port-o-call-cocktail.name: Port O' Call Cocktail
instructions: Add all of the ingredients to a mixing glass with ice. Stir and then strain into a chilled coupe. Garnish with orange zest.

portuguese-roast-fish-teleculinaria.name: Portuguese Roast Fish
instructions: Do two diagonal blows on either side of the fish and season them with salt and pepper.

Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, corte as cebolas em meias-luas e lamine os alhos; lave e corte os tomates em rodelas; limpe o pimento de sementes e corte-o em tiras. Espalhe estes ingredientes por camadas num tabuleiro de forno.
Add the salsa branch and the laurel, season with salt, pepper and colorau and water with white wine and olive oil. Have the fish on top and put in the oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 30 minutes.

Wash the potatoes, put them in a pot, cover them with water, season with salt and bake. Drain them, cut them in half and put them on a platter. Sprinkle them with chopped parsley and serve as a follow-up to the fish.

potato-and-leek-pie-lezzet.name: Potato And Leek Pie
instructions: 1. Saucer, eggs, butter, pepper and juice.
2. Stretch Wrap the movie and relax in the refrigerator for 45 minutes.
3. Put 1 tablespoon of olive oil into the pan and heat it.
4. Add your thin slices to your car and add yellowms to 2-3 minutes.
5. Add salt and pepper and leave it from the stove and cool.
6. Distilled pulp 30 cm size.
7. 2 cm from the edge and broadcast in the midst leaving space.
8.  Peyniri serpin.
9. Çseque slices of potatoes.
10. Trim the edges correctly.
11. 11. 11. 11. Finally, the egg road and olive oil yellowish lot and sprinkle the hunger.
12. From 180 degrees to fry in the oven.
12. August Serve your service.

potato-crust-quiche.name: Potato Crust Quiche
instructions: Make the crust: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C).
Add the potatoes and salt to a medium pot. Add water to cover. Bring to a boil over high heat, and cook the potatoes until they are fork-tender, about 25 minutes. Drain.

Brush a 9-inch round pie pan with the butter. Arrange the drained potatoes in an even layer in the pan. Using the flat bottom of a cup, press the potatoes firmly into the bottom and about 2 inches up the sides of the pan to form a crust. Let cool completely.

Meanwhile, make the filling: In a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, cook the bacon, stirring occasionally, until crisp, 10–12 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the bacon to a paper towel-lined plate. Crumble into small pieces, and set aside.

Discard the drippings in the skillet. Add the avocado oil to the skillet. Add the onion, and cook, stirring occasionally, until soft, about 3 minutes. Add the garlic, and cook, stirring constantly, until the garlic is fragrant, about 45 seconds. Add the spinach a handful at a time, stirring until completely wilted, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat, and let cool for about 10 minutes, or until it’s not too hot to touch.
In a medium bowl, lightly beat the eggs. Add the cream, salt, pepper, and nutmeg, and whisk to combine.

Sprinkle about half of the goat cheese over the bottom of the potato crust, then add the spinach mixture, spreading it evenly. Add the remaining goat cheese, then carefully pour the egg mixture over everything. Use a fork to gently settle the egg mixture evenly around the filling.

Transfer the pan to the preheated oven, and bake until the filling puffs up, browns slightly, and a knife inserted into the center of the quiche comes out clean, 25–35 minutes. Let cool on a rack for at least 10 minutes.
Cut into wedges, and serve.
Enjoy!

potato-salad-for-a-crowd.name: Potato Salad For A Crowd
instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain and cool potatoes, then peel and dice. Transfer to a bowl, cover, and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.

While the potatoes are cooking, place eggs into a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil, then remove from the heat and let eggs stand in hot water for 15 minutes. Remove eggs from the hot water and cool under cold running water. Peel and chop eggs. Transfer to a bowl, cover, and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight, at the same time as the potatoes.
Combine potatoes, eggs, and green onions in a large mixing bowl or roasting pan. Add mayonnaise, salt, mustard, and pepper and gently toss to combine. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

practical-baklava-with-custard-lezzet.name: Practical Baklava With Custard

pretzel-snaps-and-bacon-baked-brie.name: Pretzel Snaps And Bacon Baked Brie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.
Using scissors or a knife, cut each strip of bacon crosswise into 4–5 small rectangles. Arrange the slices on a prepared baking sheet.

Bake for 10–12 minutes, or until the bacon reaches your desired crispiness, being careful not to burn it. Transfer the bacon to a wire rack to cool, blotting with a paper towel to remove excess grease before using. Leave the oven on.
Slice the Brie into ½-inch-thick planks, then slice into 1-inch-wide squares for a total of 12 squares.

Place 12 Snyder’s Pretzel Snaps on the remaining prepared baking sheet. Top each pretzel with one cooked bacon slice, then a square of Brie, then one more bacon slice, then top each with another pretzel.
Bake the bites for 2–3 minutes, until the Brie is warm and softened, but not completely melted; keep a close eye to avoid over-melting the cheese. Remove from the oven.
Drizzle the bites with honey, then garnish each with an optional small sprig of thyme.
Serve warm.
Enjoy!

provencal-short-ribs-with-olives-and-her.name: Provençal Short Ribs With Olives And Herbs

ingredients.prep: such as Côtes du Rhône or Bordeaux

ingredients.item: A wide 6- to 8-quart heavy pot with a tight-fitting lid (for an alternative

instructions: Heat oven to 177°C with rack in lower third.
Stir together flour with 1 1/2 teaspoons salt and 1/2 teaspoon pepper in a bowl. Pat ribs dry and lightly dredge in flour mixture, knocking off excess.

Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a wide 6- to 8-quart heavy pot over medium-high heat until it shimmers. Brown ribs in 3 batches, about 8 minutes per batch. Transfer as browned to a platter. Discard fat from pot.
Cook onions, carrots, and celery in remaining 2 tablespoons oil with 1/2 teaspoon salt over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until just softened and beginning to brown, 8 to 10 minutes.
Add garlic and herbs and cook, stirring frequently, until garlic is softened and fragrant, 2 minutes.
Add wine and boil until reduced by half, about 8 minutes, then stir in broth, tomatoes with juice, and vinegar and bring to a simmer.
Return ribs to pot. Cover with the lid, then place in oven, and braise until ribs are fork-tender, 3 to 3 1/4 hours.
Transfer ribs with a slotted spoon to a bowl. Let cooking liquid stand briefly, then skim fat from top. Stir in olives. Adjust seasoning to taste, if necessary.
Return meat to pot. Grate zest from orange over top just before serving.

puffy-tacos-with-beef-picadillo.name: Puffy Tacos With Beef Picadillo

ingredients.item: Pico de gallo or other salsa

ingredients.prep: chopped tomatoes, grated sharp cheddar cheese, chopped cilantro, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Warm 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add ½ small onion, finely chopped, 1 small Yukon Gold potato, peeled, finely chopped, 1 small carrot, peeled, finely chopped, 1 small poblano chile, finely chopped, and 2 garlic cloves, thinly sliced; cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is golden and soft, 8–10 minutes. Season with kosher salt, add ⅓ cup chili powder, and cook, stirring, until chili is fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 2 lb. ground beef chuck (20% fat) and cook, breaking up meat with the back of a spoon and scraping up any browned bits from pot, until meat is browned, 12–15 minutes. Stir in 2 cups Pico de Gallo or other salsa; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until most of liquid evaporates and beef is tender, 15–20 minutes. Season beef picadillo with kosher salt.

Meanwhile, pour oil into a medium heavy pot to come 3" up the sides; fit with thermometer. Heat over high until thermometer registers 375°. Holding one of 8 corn tortillas perpendicular to the oil near the edge of the pot, carefully lower into the oil so that the tortilla slides to the bottom (this method will fry and seal both sides of the tortilla, allowing steam to inflate—or “puff”—the tortilla like a balloon). After a few seconds, the puffy tortilla will float to the surface; turn over and push the top edge of a metal spatula (a fish spatula works best) into the center of the tortilla, bending it into a taco shape, and press it below the oil’s surface. Hold in place and cook until the indentation is set and the shell is golden brown and crisp, about 1 minute. Invert taco shell on paper towels to drain. Repeat with remaining tortillas.

Spoon beef picadillo into shells and top with shredded iceberg lettuce, chopped tomatoes, grated sharp cheddar cheese, and chopped cilantro. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing.

Do Ahead: Beef picadillo can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat before serving. 

Editor’s note: This puffy taco recipe was first printed in our November 2015 issue. Head this way for more great taco recipes, available on the Epicurious app →

pumpkin-custard.name: Pumpkin Custard
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Butter six custard cups or ramekins.

Mix eggs, egg yolks, and flour together in a bowl until smooth. Whisk pumpkin puree, half-and-half, milk, sugar, salt, vanilla extract, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger into egg mixture until smooth; spoon into prepared custard cups.
Arrange custard cups onto a large baking pan. Pour enough water around the custard cups to fill pan halfway.
Bake in the preheated oven until custards are set but still jiggle in the middle, about 40 minutes. Serve at room temperature or chilled.

pumpkin-soup-with-gruyere.name: Pumpkin Soup With Gruyère

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Fresh breadcrumbs made from white bread

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Cut out a wide circle around stem of pumpkin to make a lid. Lift lid; scrape off any seeds and set aside. Scoop out seeds and strings from inside pumpkin.

Place pumpkin in a roasting pan or on a rimmed baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Rub pumpkin flesh with butter. Sprinkle all over inside with ground fennel seeds and piment d'Espelette. Season lightly with salt and pepper. Add cheese, breadcrumbs, garlic, and bay leaves. Pour in stock to come within 3" of the pumpkin's rim. Cover with lid.

Roast pumpkin for 1 hour. Remove lid; put lid flesh side up on pan alongside pumpkin and return to oven. Continue to roast until pumpkin flesh is soft when pierced with a knife (take care not to puncture skin), 30-90 minutes more, depending on size of pumpkin.

Discard bay leaves. Season soup to taste with salt and pepper. To serve, gently scoop a big spoonful of flesh from sides or bottom of pumpkin into each bowl and ladle stock over. Garnish with parsley.

pumpkin-chocolate-chip-muffins.name: Pumpkin-chocolate Chip Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line 36 muffin cups with paper liners.
Mix pumpkin, sugar, eggs, coconut oil, and olive oil together in a mixing bowl.
Combine flour, hemp, wheat germ, flax seeds, yeast, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, and hemp powder in another bowl. Blend into pumpkin mixture. Stir in dark chocolate chips and molasses.
Fill the prepared muffins tins evenly with batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean, 15 to 18 minutes.
